title: Serve exposes work-session and task-run continuity endpoints
description: Black-box smoke for `armature serve` that verifies work-session and task-run discovery endpoints from an isolated runtime home.
input: Start `armature serve`, query /work-sessions, /work-sessions/latest, /work-sessions/:id/task-runs, and /task-runs/:id, and verify the seeded work-session/task-run pair is visible.
command:
bash -lc 'REPO_ROOT=${PROJECT_DIR:-$(pwd)}; cd "$REPO_ROOT"; bash agent-eval/scripts/prepare-fast-gate.sh >/dev/null; TMP_HOME=$(mktemp -d); PORT=$(node -e '"'"'const net=require("node:net"); const s=net.createServer(); s.listen(0,"127.0.0.1",()=>{console.log(s.address().port); s.close();});'"'"'); mkdir -p "$TMP_HOME/.armature/work-sessions/sessions" "$TMP_HOME/.armature/work-sessions/task-runs"; cat > "$TMP_HOME/.armature/work-sessions/sessions/ws-demo.json" <<EOF
{
  "id": "ws-demo",
  "sourceSurface": "run",
  "cwd": "/tmp/demo-project",
  "provider": "openai",
  "model": "gpt-5.4",
  "status": "completed",
  "createdAt": "2026-04-22T00:00:00.000Z",
  "updatedAt": "2026-04-22T00:01:00.000Z",
  "latestTaskRunId": "tr-demo",
  "taskRunCount": 1
}
EOF
cat > "$TMP_HOME/.armature/work-sessions/task-runs/tr-demo.json" <<EOF
{
  "id": "tr-demo",
  "workSessionId": "ws-demo",
  "kind": "run",
  "title": "demo run",
  "status": "completed",
  "surface": "cli",
  "cwd": "/tmp/demo-project",
  "provider": "openai",
  "model": "gpt-5.4",
  "attempt": 1,
  "createdAt": "2026-04-22T00:00:00.000Z",
  "startedAt": "2026-04-22T00:00:00.000Z",
  "updatedAt": "2026-04-22T00:01:00.000Z",
  "completedAt": "2026-04-22T00:01:00.000Z",
  "summary": "demo run",
  "evidence": []
}
EOF
env -i PATH="$PATH" HOME="$TMP_HOME" ARMATURE_HOME="$TMP_HOME/.armature" ARMATURE_PROVIDER=openai OPENAI_API_KEY=test-openai-key node dist/bin/armature.js serve --port "$PORT" > "$TMP_HOME/serve.out" 2>&1 & SERVER_PID=$!; trap "kill $SERVER_PID 2>/dev/null; rm -rf $TMP_HOME" EXIT; bash agent-eval/scripts/wait-for-http.sh "http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/work-sessions" "^(200)$" 50 0.1; echo "--- work-sessions ---"; curl -sf "http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/work-sessions"; echo; echo "--- work-sessions latest ---"; curl -sf "http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/work-sessions/latest"; echo; echo "--- work-session task-runs ---"; curl -sf "http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/work-sessions/ws-demo/task-runs"; echo; echo "--- task-run detail ---"; curl -sf "http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/task-runs/tr-demo"'
